name: ILLUMINATED

abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back:
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: Terrifying:
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

triggers.name: Sharpened Brilliance
triggers.text: Discard a friendly Brilliance token from either this model or the target. When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: The Light Inside
triggers.text: This model or the target gains a Brilliance token.

triggers.name: Consume Brilliance
triggers.text: Remove a friendly Brilliance token from the target. This model heals 2.

actions.name: Shimmerlungs
actions.effects: The target and models within (aura)2" of the target gain a Brilliance token.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Craving Satisfied
triggers.text: When resolving, allies within (aura)1" of the target heal 1.

actions.name: Shining Example
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may remove a friendly Brilliance token from itself.
actions.effects: Move this model up to 4". If a Brilliance token was removed, it may increase the distance moved by +2".

extraction_notes: Minion characteristic shows (3) indicating model_limit of 3
